description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a low, horizontal profile and a simple, rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with some sections featuring a muted yellow accent, likely representing a different material or painted facade. The roof is flat and extends slightly beyond the walls, giving the structure a modern, streamlined appearance. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing varied natural light entry points. The building includes a small, covered entry area that may serve as a porch, and the overall design suggests a focus on functional, open-plan living. The structure is surrounded by other similar buildings, indicating it is part of a neighborhood or residential complex.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light exterior walls, and yellow accent sections. Asymmetrical window placement and a small covered entry area are visible.
description_view_0: From this angle, the bungalow's yellow-accented section and main entry area are prominent, with several windows visible on the front and side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the flat roof and the rear of the bungalow, showing fewer windows and a more solid wall structure.
description_view_2: The side of the bungalow is visible, with the yellow accent wrapping around and additional windows spaced along the facade.
description_view_3: The front and side of the bungalow are shown, emphasizing the entry area, yellow accent, and a cluster of windows on the main facade.
